summary: Diane Hendricks shares her personal journey from being a teenage mother on a Wisconsin dairy farm to becoming a self-made billionaire and co-founder of ABC Supply. She emphasizes the power of the American Dream, the importance of resilience in the face of tragedy, and the need for pro-business political leadership to protect entrepreneurship from overregulation and high taxes.

principles.statement: The American Dream is achievable for anyone through hard work and determination.
principles.rationale: She went from being a teenage single mother without a college degree to a highly successful entrepreneur simply by working hard and taking risks in the United States.
principles.source_quote: I'VE LIVING PROOF THAT THE AMERICAN TREATMENT IS POSSIBLE WITH HARD WORK AND DETERMINATION.

principles.statement: When faced with devastating personal and professional loss, you must choose to fight rather than give up.
principles.rationale: After losing her husband and business partner, she faced a critical juncture but chose to persevere, ultimately quadrupling the size of her company.
principles.source_quote: I HAD TO DECIDE WHETHER TO FIGHT OR FOLD, I CHOSE TO FIGHT.

principles.statement: Creating domestic jobs is a more important business achievement than mere corporate scale.
principles.rationale: While proud of building the largest roofing distributor in the country, she highlights employing Americans as the greater and more meaningful achievement.
principles.source_quote: BUT WHAT IS MORE IMPORTANT IS WE'RE CREATING THE JOBS RIGHT HERE IN THE UNITED STATES OF AMERICA.

mental_models.name: Fight or Fold
mental_models.description: A binary framing for responding to catastrophic setbacks. Instead of getting lost in the complexity of a crisis, reduce the choice to either giving up entirely or fighting to move forward.
mental_models.example: Applied when her husband and co-founder died 16 years ago, leaving her to decide the fate of her family and her massive company.

heuristics: In life, it is easy to quit, and very hard to win.

signature_quotes.text: I'VE LIVING PROOF THAT THE AMERICAN TREATMENT IS POSSIBLE WITH HARD WORK AND DETERMINATION.
signature_quotes.context: Opening her speech to establish her background and belief in the American Dream.

signature_quotes.text: I HAD TO DECIDE WHETHER TO FIGHT OR FOLD, I CHOSE TO FIGHT.
signature_quotes.context: Discussing her mindset after the death of her husband and business partner.

signature_quotes.text: SO TO ALL OF YOU ASPIRING ENTREPRENEURS OUT THERE, IF I CAN MAKE IT, YOU CAN MAKE IT TOO.
IN LIFE, IT IS EASY TO QUIT. AND VERY HARD TO WIN.
signature_quotes.context: Explaining the necessity of resilience and fighting for success.

anti_patterns.description: Imposing heavy regulations, high interest rates, and high taxes on businesses.
anti_patterns.why_it_fails: It threatens the American Dream by making it impossible for aspiring entrepreneurs to afford loans or build companies from nothing.
